prestazioni: Full bolt-on S55B30O1 (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) Stage 2+ tune by MSS Performance with custom ethanol mapping for E60-E85 blends, targeting 650whp on 28psi via upgraded BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbos (62mm compressor, 74mm turbine) with billet compressor wheels and ceramic ball bearings, paired with a CSF Race intercooler (bar-and-plate, 1200hp core) and custom 3.5" titanium downpipes by FTP Motorsport (catless, 304 stainless steel)

Drivetrain reinforcement via a ZF 8HP75 8-speed transmission with a P3 Cars carbon fiber driveshaft, OS Giken Super Lock differential (2.2way, 85% lockup), and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily twin-disc (ceramic-metallic, 800ft-lb torque capacity) with a billet steel flywheel

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8/18-position rebound/compression, 20mm ride height adjustment), MCS 2-way remote-reservoir dampers (adjustable bump/rebound), and a full polyurethane bushings kit by Vibratechnics (subframe, control arms, diff mounts) paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (FRP construction, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber canards by Seibon (pre-preg autoclave, 3K twill weave) and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (ABS plastic, 50mm overhang) with integrated air curtains by Vorsteiner

Exterior carbon fiber overhaul with a full APR Performance GTC-300 carbon fiber hood (dual center vents, 50% weight reduction), a custom carbon fiber trunk by 3D Carbon (dual duckbill spoiler, 3M matte clear coat), and a set of Volk Racing TE37V wheels (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x12 +30 rear) in Hyper Silver with titanium hardware and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear)

Interior weight reduction via a full Recaro SPG XL carbon fiber seat kit (FIA 8862-2009 certified, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 8-point, bolt-in, integrated harness bar) and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) paired with a CAE Ultra-Shifter (short throw, billet aluminum)
